goals: Define the full command/subcommand tree: `parallax create|edit image|video|audio`
Declare all flags (`--model`, `--prompt`, `--input`, `--output`, and media-specific params) with types, defaults, and descriptions
Validate required flags and known model values, exiting with code `1` and a clear error message on failure
Ship as an installable global binary (`bun link` / `bun install -g`)
Provide complete `--help` at every command level

userStories.title: Top-level help
userStories.description: As an end user, I want to run `parallax --help` so that I can see all available commands and a short description of each.

acceptanceCriteria.text: `parallax --help` prints the tool name, version, description, and the list of subcommands (`create`, `edit`)
`parallax` with no arguments shows help and exits with code `0`

userStories.title: `create` subcommand help
userStories.description: As an end user, I want to run `parallax create --help` so that I can see the supported media types and their flags.

userStories.title: `edit` subcommand help
userStories.description: As an end user, I want to run `parallax edit --help` so that I can see the supported media types for editing and their flags.

userStories.title: Media-level help (`create image`, `create video`, `create audio`, `edit image`, `edit video`)
userStories.description: As an end user, I want to run e.g. `parallax create image --help` so that I can see which flags are available for that specific media type.

acceptanceCriteria.text: Each of the 5 media commands shows its specific flags with type, default value (if any), and description:
Each media command's help footer includes the list of available models for that command, e.g.:

userStories.title: Known-model validation
userStories.description: As an end user, I want to receive a clear error when I pass an unknown `--model` value so that I know which models are supported.

acceptanceCriteria.text: When `--model` is not in the known list for that media type, the CLI prints:

userStories.title: Required-flag validation
userStories.description: As an end user, I want to receive a clear error when I omit a required flag so that I know what's missing.

acceptanceCriteria.text: Omitting `--model` or `--prompt` on any `create` or `edit` command prints:
Omitting `--input` on any `edit` command prints: `Error: --input is required`

userStories.title: Stub execution
userStories.description: As an end user running a valid command, I want to see a "not yet implemented" message (instead of a crash) so that the CLI is usable as soon as a model is added.

acceptanceCriteria.text: A fully-valid command (all required flags present, model known) prints:

userStories.title: Installable binary
userStories.description: As a developer setting up the toolchain, I want to install the CLI globally with `bun link` so that `parallax` is available as a system command.

acceptanceCriteria.text: After linking, running `parallax --help` from any directory works
`package.json` `bin` field points to the correct entry file

functionalRequirements.description: ** The CLI uses `commander` (already declared in `package.json`) as the parsing framework.
** All flags are declared with `.option()` / `.requiredOption()` using long-form names (e.g. `--negative-prompt`). Short aliases are optional.
** Model validation runs inside the command action handler before any pipeline call. If invalid, print to `stderr` and `process.exit(1)`.
** Required-flag validation: `--model` and `--prompt` are required on all 5 commands; `--input` is additionally required on both `edit` commands.
** Stub action: when all validations pass, print a single line to `stdout`:
** `package.json` `bin.parallax` must point to `./src/index.ts` (already correct) and the shebang `#!/usr/bin/env bun` must be present at line 1.

** The `@parallax/sdk` `GenerateImageRequest` / `GenerateImageResponse` types are kept but not used yet; do not delete them. New SDK types for video and audio requests/responses may be added as placeholder interfaces.
